title: rubus omalus var. suprapilosus
intro: Rubus omalus var. suprapilosus, also known as the suprapilosus raspberry, is a lesser-known variety of the raspberry plant. It belongs to the Rosaceae family and is native to certain regions with temperate climates. The medicinal properties of Rubus omalus var. suprapilosus include its high antioxidant content and potential anti-inflammatory properties, which can be used to treat various health conditions. Herbal preparations of this plant include infusions, teas, and extracts, and are believed to offer health benefits such as reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and supporting immune function.
